candidate.lever: Direct rank-1 unbatched operand plus batched tensor indices gather path in BatchTrace

isomorphism.ordering: Moved indices are traversed in row-major order and output shape remains the moved indices shape.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: N/A; gather copies one literal per index.
isomorphism.floating_point: No arithmetic; copied operand literals preserve exact bits. F64 fill behavior remains dtype fill NaN when applicable.
isomorphism.index_modes: Existing parse_gather_index_mode, resolve_gather_index, gather_index_literal_to_usize, and gather_fill_literal_for_dtype helpers are reused.
isomorphism.fallbacks: Unknown index mode, scalar moved indices, non-rank1 operands, empty operands, and non-slice_sizes=1 cases fall through to the previous generic gather path.

validation.focused_tests: RCH cargo test -p fj-dispatch test_batch_trace_gather_batched -- --nocapture: 7 passed
validation.clippy: RCH cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings: passed; normal deps clippy blocked by unrelated peer-dirty fj-lax/src/einsum.rs
validation.ubs: ubs crates/fj-dispatch/src/batching.rs: 0 critical issues; existing file-wide warning inventory remains
